--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Journal Scope

Journal of Animal Science and Technology
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In62plbI6i06dsdI12&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
(JAST) is a peer-reviewed, open access journal publishing original research,
review articles and notes in all fields of animal science. Topics covered by the
journal include: genetics and breeding, physiology, nutrition of monogastric
animals, nutrition of ruminants, animal products (milk, meat, eggs and their
by-products) and their processing, grasslands and roughages, livestock
environment, animal biotechnology, animal behavior and welfare.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Reasons to Publish with Us

• Publication costs are covered by the Korean Society of Animal Science and
Technology • All articles indexed in PubMed and PubMed Central • Expert
international Editorial Board

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Publish with us
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In62plbI6i06dsdI13&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Best wishes,

The BioMed Central Team

Journal of Animal Science and Technology
Editor-in-Chief: Professor Inho Choi
 
Journal of Animal Science and Technology
Editor-in-Chief: Professor Inho Choi
 
 
Submit Manuscript  |  Editorial Board  |  Submission Guidelines  |  Article Alerts
 

Dear jeff epstein,

We are writing to let you know of some recent highly accessed articles published in Journal of Animal Science and Technology (JAST), an open access journal.

Read Our Top Articles

REVIEW
Recent advances in canola meal utilization in swine nutrition
 
Mejicanos et al.
Abstract   |  Full text   |  PDF
RESEARCH
Effects of dietary supplementation with rice bran oil on the growth performance, blood parameters, and immune response of broiler chickens
 
Hwan Ku Kang and Chan Ho Kim
Abstract   |  Full text   |  PDF
RESEARCH
Effect of misting and wallowing cooling systems on milk yield, blood and physiological variables during heat stress in lactating Murrah buffalo
 
Yadav et al.
Abstract   |  Full text   |  PDF

Journal Scope

Journal of Animal Science and Technology (JAST) is a peer-reviewed, open access journal publishing original research, review articles and notes in all fields of animal science. Topics covered by the journal include: genetics and breeding, physiology, nutrition of monogastric animals, nutrition of ruminants, animal products (milk, meat, eggs and their by-products) and their processing, grasslands and roughages, livestock environment, animal biotechnology, animal behavior and welfare.

Reasons to Publish with Us

• Publication costs are covered by the Korean Society of Animal Science and Technology
• All articles indexed in PubMed and PubMed Central
• Expert international Editorial Board

Publish with us

Best wishes,

The BioMed Central Team
